findings.text: Risk scores at or above the policy maximum are now allowed, including scores that previously exceeded the maximum and were denied.
Admin users are now denied before ownership approval checks, reversing the previous admin override behavior.
Blocked states are no longer checked, so requests in policy.blocked_states can be allowed.
summarize_recent now returns limit + 1 items when enough results exist, exceeding the requested limit.
Changing the audit label prefix from decision: to governance-decision: can break callers or stored audit references expecting the documented/previous label format.
